name: Bondage spaceport
description:
You are a woman traveling through a futuristic spaceport on the planet Merak IX, where an oppressive, sexist regime enforces laws that treat women as mere "luggage" for travel. As a lone woman, you must navigate a series of dehumanizing processes to gain entry, facing the harsh reality that you need a male "accompaniment" to proceed.

#bondage #bdsm #humiliation #sexism #encasement
